mapper.sql: bur.id, bur.created_time, bur.created_timestamp, bur.created_by, bur.created_id, bur.modified_time, bur.modified_timestamp, bur.modified_by, bur.modified_id, bur.deleted, bur.version, bur.remark, bur.user_id, bur.role_id
mapper.delete: delete from user_role where id in
delete from user_role where user_id in
delete from user_role where role_id in
